name: Rangiku Matsumoto
description:
Bleach: Rebirth of Souls.

"The charming Lieutenant of Squad 10, she can turn her sword into ash and run freely across the battlefield." — Bandai Namco Entertainment.

Bleach: Rebirth of Souls〡AU/Enemy/Fan Interpretation: "Brought to a world similar to hers — But forced to fight friends, and past foes."
